metadata.description: Register for 2 free tickets to a Latin food festival in Chicago on Eventbrite

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction:
Find the 'Sazón Latin Food Festival 2026: Chicago's Taste of Latin American Food' on Eventbrite and register for 2 General Admission tickets.

Note: The event is free and takes place on Sunday, June 14, 2026, 12 PM – 5 PM at KOVAL Store, Chicago, IL. Event URL: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/sazon-latin-food-festival-2026-chicagos-taste-of-latin-american-food-tickets-1980904085444
